evaluators.name: Cheapest Qualifying Toddler Program Enrollment Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched for toddler programs with the correct filters and started enrollment for the cheapest qualifying full-time toddler program within 5 miles of ZIP 94105 under $1,500/month.

evaluators.name: Downtown Weekday Morning Tour Request Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user submitted an in-person tour request at the Downtown (94105) campus for a 3-year-old child on a weekday morning between June 10 and June 20, with the correct parent details.

evaluators.name: Lakeside Preschool Comparison and Cheaper Waitlist Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user compared half-day and full-day preschool programs at the Lakeside campus for a 4-year-old and joined the waitlist for the program with the lower annual tuition, with the correct child name and start month.

evaluators.name: Infant 3-Day Extended Tuition Estimate and Quote Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user used the tuition calculator for an infant on M/W/F from 8:00 to 18:00 with a $1,000 max budget and then saved a quote with the specified email and quote name based on that estimate.

evaluators.name: Top-Rated Toddler Teacher Favorite Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user favorited a toddler teacher with at least 5 years of experience and rating ≥4.5, and that the favorite is for the highest-rated qualifying toddler teacher with an appropriate label.

evaluators.name: Next-Month Free Weekend Family Events RSVP Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user RSVP'd for the first two free family events next month that occur on Saturday or Sunday afternoons, registering at least three attendees for each.

evaluators.name: Potty Training FAQ Search and Curriculum Contact Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched FAQs about potty training with appropriate parameters and submitted a contact message with the 'Curriculum & Potty Training' subject, correct question, and contact details from a potty-training FAQ article.

evaluators.name: Newsletter Subscription with Topics, Campus, and Age Groups Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user subscribed to the newsletter with the specified contact details, selected one monthly updates topic and one family events topic, chose the Mission Creek campus as preferred, and indicated infant and toddler age ranges.
